button.supertip: Sends selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active Speech document. (` key)

button.label: Send To Speech
button.supertip: Sends selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active Speech document. (` key)

button.label: Send To Speech End
button.description: Send To End Of Speech Document
button.supertip: Sends selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to end of active Speech document. (Alt + ` key)

button.label: Send To Flow (Cell)
button.description: Send to active cell on Excel flow
button.supertip: Sends selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active cell on Excel flow. (Ctrl/Cmd + ` key)

button.label: Send To Flow (Column)
button.description: Send to active column on Excel flow
button.supertip: Sends selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active column on Excel flow, one cell per paragraph. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + ` key)

button.label: Send Headings To Flow (Cell)
button.description: Sends headings and cites in selection to active cell on Excel flow
button.supertip: Sends headings and cites in selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active cell on Excel flow. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + ~ key)

button.label: Send Headings To Flow (Column)
button.description: Sends headings and cites in selection to active column on Excel flow
button.supertip: Sends headings and cites in selected text or current pocket/hat/block/card to active column on Excel flow, one cell per paragraph. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + Shift + ~ key)

button.description: Selects all content and subheadings underneath the current heading level of the cursor
button.label: Select Heading and Content
button.supertip: Selects all content and subheadings underneath the current heading level of the cursor (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + A key)

button.label: Move Heading Down
button.supertip: Moves current heading down a level in the document outline. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + Down key)

button.label: Move Heading Up
button.supertip: Moves current heading up a level in the document outline. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + Up key)

button.label: Move To Bottom
button.supertip: Moves current heading to the bottom of the document. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + Shift + Down key)

dynamicMenu.supertip: Opens the Virtual Tub Menu. Configure in the Verbatim settings.

button.supertip: If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 2' for default F2 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 3' for default F3 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 4' for default F4 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 5' for default F5 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 6' for default F6 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 7' for default F7 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 8' for default F8 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 9' for default F9 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + 0' for default F10 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + -' for default F11 macro.
If you have trouble with function keys, try alternate shortcut 'Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + =' for default F12 macro.

button.label: Shrink
button.description: Shrink non-underlined text to 8pt and lower
button.supertip: Sets all non-underlined text in the paragraph to 8pt and smaller. (Alt + F3)

button.label: Shrink
button.description: Shrink non-underlined text to 8pt and lower
button.supertip: Sets all non-underlined text in the paragraph to 8pt and smaller. (Alt + F3)

button.label: Shrink All
button.supertip: Shrinks un-underlined text in all cards in the document to 8pt.

button.label: Shrink Pilcrows
button.supertip: Shrinks pilcrows in the paragraph to 8pt. If run at top of doc, will shrink ALL pilcrows.

button.description: Unshrink all text in the document smaller than the normal font size
button.label: Unshrink All
button.supertip: Unshrink all text in the document smaller than the normal font size

toggleButton.supertip: Toggles Underlining Mode which underlines any text you select without needing to press an additional key. Press again to turn off.

toggleButton.description: Toggle retaining paragraphs when condensing text
toggleButton.supertip: Toggles retaining paragraphs when condensing text. Can be configured in the Verbatim settings.

toggleButton.description: Toggle using Pilcrows when condensing paragraphs
toggleButton.supertip: Toggles using Pilcrows when condensing paragraphs. Can be configured in the Verbatim settings.

button.label: Fix Fake Tags
button.supertip: Replaces fake tags (for example tags accidentally formatted as Cite) with real tags.

button.description: Convert all analytics in the document into tags
button.label: Convert Analytics To Tags
button.supertip: Converts all text in the document formatted with custom analytics styles into tags.

button.label: Fix Formatting Gaps
button.supertip: Fixes card formatting irregularities like spaces missing underlining and highlighting.

button.label: Convert To Default Styles
button.supertip: Convert document to only use default styles. Run before 'Remove Extra Styles.'

button.label: Remove Extra Styles
button.supertip: Removes non-default styles from document. Safest to run 'Convert To Default Styles' first.

button.label: Auto Number Tags
button.supertip: Automatically prepends numbers to all tags. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + #)

button.label: De-Number Tags
button.supertip: Removes numbering from all tags.

button.label: Insert Header
button.supertip: Inserts a header with your personal information from the Verbatim settings.

button.label: Remove Emphasis
button.supertip: Converts emphasized text to underlining.

button.label: Remove Non-Highlighted Underlining
button.supertip: Clears formatting from underlined text in the selection or document that isn't highlighted.

button.label: Remove Blanks
button.supertip: Removes blank headers from the NavPane.

button.label: Remove Pilcrows
button.supertip: Removes all pilcrows from the document.

button.label: Remove Hyperlinks
button.supertip: Removes hyperlinks from the document.

button.label: Remove Bookmarks
button.supertip: Removes bookmarks from the document.

button.label: Update Styles
button.supertip: Updates all document styles from the template. (Ctrl/Cmd + F12)

button.label: Select Similar Formatting
button.supertip: Selects all formatting in the document similar to the selection. (Ctrl/Cmd + F2)

button.label: Condense No Pilcrows
button.supertip: Condenses text without pilcrows, regardless of normal pilcrow settings. (Ctrl/Cmd + F3)

button.label: Condense With Pilcrows
button.supertip: Condenses text using pilcrows, regardless of normal pilcrow settings. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + F3)

button.label: Uncondense
button.supertip: Uncondense card, replacing pilcrows with original paragraph breaks. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + Shift + F3)

button.label: Standardize Highlighting
button.supertip: Standardizes all highlighting to the currently selected color.

button.label: Standardize Highlighting With Exception
button.supertip: Standardizes all highlighting to the currently selected color, except for the exception color configured in the Verbatim settings.

button.label: Auto-Emphasize First
button.supertip: Adds emphasis to first letter of each selected word. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + F10)

button.label: Auto Underline Card
button.supertip: Automatically underlines the current card - cursor must be in the tag. (Alt + F9)

button.label: Duplicate Cite
button.supertip: Duplicates the previous cite in the document. Cites must be typed as a single paragraph and use the Cite style for the last name/date. (Alt + F8)

button.label: Auto Format Cite
button.supertip: While the cursor is in a cite, will attempt to automatically apply the Cite style to the last name and date. Uses the month/day for cites during the current year. (Ctrl/Cmd + F8)

button.label: Reformat All Cites
button.supertip: Automatically auto formats existing cites, useful to switch to year instead of month/day for older cites.

button.label: Get From Cite Creator
button.supertip: For use with the CiteMaker browser extension - will attempt to paste the cite from the top-most tab. (Alt + F2)

button.label: Speech
button.supertip: Creates a new Speech document. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + N)

dynamicMenu.supertip: Suggest names for a new Speech Doc, including from your current rounds on Tabroom.

button.label: Choose
button.supertip: Lets you select which document to use as the active Speech doc.

button.label: New
button.supertip: Creates a new Verbatim document.

button.label: New Document
button.supertip: Creates a new Verbatim document.

button.description: Create a new Verbatim Flow in Excel
button.label: New Flow
button.supertip: Creates a new Verbatim Flow in Excel.

button.label: Merge
button.supertip: Combine multiple documents (such as speech documents) into one.

button.label: USB
button.supertip: Copies the current file to the root of the USB drive. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + U)

button.label: Share
button.supertip: Shares document to share.tabroom.com and automatically emails linked participants. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + S)
Verbatim Settings

button.label: Timer
button.supertip: Starts an on-screen timer. Must be in the same directory as the template and called Timer.exe (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + T)

button.label: OCR
button.supertip: Automatically OCR's a screengrab and pastes the contents. After clicking the button, click once in the upper left of your capture area, then drag down and right and click in the lower right of your capture area to OCR.

button.label: Stats
button.supertip: Displays stats about the current document, such as number of cards, highlighted words, and a time estimate. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + I)

toggleButton.label: Record
toggleButton.supertip: Starts an audio recording from your computer's microphone. Press again to stop and save the file. Save location can be configured in the Verbatim settings.
Toggles automatic opening from your Auto Open Folder. Can be configured in the Verbatim settings.

button.supertip: Runs NavPaneCycle to cycle the headers on the NavPane automatically. Must be in the same directory as the template and called NavPaneCycle.exe (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + W)
Add a new warrant box.

button.label: New Warrant
button.supertip: Add a new warrant box.

button.label: Delete All Warrants
button.supertip: Deletes all warrants in the document.

editBox.supertip: Searches your computer for files containing a search term. Enter a search term and press enter. Search location can be configured in the Verbatim settings.

dynamicMenu.description: Search results - click to open a file.
dynamicMenu.supertip: Search results - click to open a file.

button.label: Read
button.supertip: Switches to reading view. (Ctrl/Cmd + Alt + R)
Switches to the default view.

toggleButton.supertip: Toggles 'invisibility' mode, which hides all card text except highlighted text. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + V goes visible)

button.supertip: Arranges open windows side-by-side, with the active Speech doc on the right. Can be configured in the Verbatim settings. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Tab)

control.supertip: Cycle through currently open windows. (Ctrl/Cmd + Tab)

button.label: Caselist
button.supertip: Opens the Caselist Wizard to walk you through uploading your document to the college or high school wiki as cites, open source, or both.

button.label: Wikify
button.supertip: Converts your document into wiki-ready syntax.

button.label: Cite Request Doc
button.supertip: Turns your document into a cite-request ready format.

button.label: Cite Request Card
button.supertip: Turns a single card into cite-request ready format. (Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Q)

button.label: paperlessdebate
button.supertip: Opens paperlessdebate.com in a web browser.

button.label: Verbatim Help
button.supertip: Opens Verbatim Help. (F1)
Opens a cheat sheet with all the Verbatim keyboard shortcuts for easy reference.

button.label: Settings
button.supertip: Opens the Verbatim Settings (Alt + F1)
